MINI MINUTES: Commissioner Everett Hewlett Jr.; Clerk: NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Midtown Park Corporation, is present. Represented by Rip Mallory.
Attorney, Michael Shepherd, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Roderick Bowden, is present.
Attorney, Casey McTigue, representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Mark Schreiber, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 304B, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
This case settled, the trial date of JAN-03-2010 is vacated.
